version: engine v12 (loss bug fix + actual-risk filter)
config: e37 corrected (filter OFF, 1 attempt/day per session)

engine_correction_notes.v11_bug: Loss accounting recorded -sl_dist instead of -(ep - sp). For DIRECT breakout where entry > boxHi but SL < boxLo, real loss includes box-width crossing.
engine_correction_notes.v12_fix: Engine now uses actual entry-to-SL distance for both PnL and max_sl_pts filter. Pine math was always correct.
engine_correction_notes.delta_explanation: True loss per SL exit is ~bw + slDist (not just slDist). 6 losses × ~14pt avg under-counted = -84pt correction.
